summary: RSSSource implementation of Source interface with HTTP conditional requests, ETag/Last-Modified caching, and gofeed parsing
side_effects: http.DefaultClient.Do() - makes HTTP requests to RSS/Atom feeds with conditional headers (If-None-Match, If-Modified-Since)
notes: Implements source.Source interface. Constructor: NewRSSSource(name, feedURL string). Checkpoint format: RFC3339_timestamp|etag|last_modified for incremental sync with HTTP-level caching. Supports 304 Not Modified responses for bandwidth optimization. Parses both RSS 2.0 and Atom feeds via gofeed library. Text content priority: Content > Description > Title. Author extraction from item.Author or item.Authors[0]. Timestamp precedence: PublishedParsed > UpdatedParsed > time.Now().
